# VibeDB v0.2.6 Release Notes

VibeDB v0.2.6 is here! This release brings a major overhaul to the Query Editor and Result Grid, introduces powerful new Table View inspection tools, and further hardens the application's performance with lazy-loading and unified logging.

## 🔍 Professional Query Workspace

- **Reworked Split-Pane Layout**: The Query Editor now features a constrained split-pane design with improved layout clamping, ensuring a stable and predictable workspace.
- **Upgraded Result Grid**: The result workspace has been completely rebuilt for power users:
  - **Virtualization**: Now supports thousands of rows in query results with zero lag.
  - **Cell Inspector**: View full, unclipped values in any cell with a dedicated inspection mode.
  - **Sticky Headers**: Keep your column context visible even when scrolling deep into result sets.
  - **Deterministic Widths**: Improved column sizing logic for better readability.

## 📊 Table View Power Tools

- **Row Inspector**: A new internal right-side panel that allows for full-value inspection of specific rows without cluttering the main grid.
- **Customizable Pagination**: You can now select your preferred rows-per-page directly from the Table View footer.
- **Expanded Filtering**: The filter panel has been redesigned for larger screens, offering a more robust interface for building complex conditions.
- **Performance Polish**: Optimized the scroll path and body rendering to ensure "buttery smooth" interaction even on low-end hardware.

## ⚡ Architecture & Performance

- **On-Demand Loading**: Active tab views, major dialogs, and drawers are now lazy-loaded. VibeDB only loads what you are actually using, keeping the initial memory footprint lean.
- **Unified Rust-Emitted Logging**: Table browsing, filtering, pagination, and transactions now share a single, robust logging path emitted directly from the Rust backend.
- **Log Drawer Ordering**: The log drawer now correctly prioritizes recent activity, showing the newest SQL events at the top.

## 🛠️ Developer & UX Enhancements

- **Dev Tools & Data Generator**: Built-in developer tools and a sample data generator are now available in Settings (guarded for production safety) for testing and debugging.
- **Global Toast Feedback**: A new, non-blocking toast notification system provides immediate confirmation for copy actions and other background tasks.
- **Copy Helper**: Integrated a centralized clipboard helper to ensure consistent "Copied" feedback across the entire application.

---

_VibeDB is evolving fast! We are now moving toward Phase 2 (Turso Edge Support). Check out the [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) to see the full journey._
